name: Jadephantom
personality: A ghost of quiet resolve, Jadephantom adjusts its tophat and settles in to watch your deployment pipeline as long as it takes — hours, days, geological eons. Its × eyes hold no judgments, only observations, and its PATIENCE is genuine enough to make you feel guilty for refreshing the logs. It simply cannot muster the contempt required for SNARK.
defaultPersonality: A spectral presence who haunts your dead code and whispers about the bugs you thought you fixed.
